article.title: Agent 商业化的拐点：Cursor 40 亿 / Cognition 8 亿 / Lindy 15 亿——90 天 ARR 集体撞线的产业裂变
article.title_en: The Agent Commercialization Inflection Point: Cursor $4B / Cognition $800M / Lindy $150M — 90 Days of ARR Convergence Reshapes the Industry
article.subtitle: 2026 年 7 月 10 日 The Information / Bloomberg / TechCrunch 三家同日抛出三份重磅数据——Cursor 40 亿、Cognition Devin 8 亿、Lindy 15 亿——三家 Agent 头部公司在同一周撞线 10 亿门槛。同期 Kimi K3 MIT 开源冲击、Anthropic 4000 亿估值、SAG-AFTRA AI 演员谈判——AI Agent 从「Demo 秀」变成「账单表」的关键 90 天正式到来。
article.subtitle_en: On July 10, 2026, The Information, Bloomberg, and TechCrunch simultaneously released three blockbuster figures — Cursor $4B, Cognition Devin $800M, Lindy $150M — with three Agent leaders converging on the $1B threshold in the same week. Coupled with Kimi K3's MIT open-source shock, Anthropic's $400B valuation round, and SAG-AFTRA's AI actor negotiations — the 90-day window that transformed AI Agent from 'Demo Show' to 'Invoice Sheet' has arrived.
article.author: AI News Daily 编辑部
article.meta_description: 2026 年 7 月 10 日 The Information / Bloomberg / TechCrunch 三家同日披露：Cursor ARR 冲上 40 亿美元、Cognition Devin 冲上 8 亿美元、Lindy 15 亿——三家 Agent 头部公司 90 天集体撞线 10 亿门槛。本文从事实核对、Cursor 40 亿人效经济学、Cognition Devin 生产化突破、Lindy 客服 Agent 横切逻辑、底层模型分层、Agent 单价定价时代、AI 投资地图第四次重塑、Agent 时代垂直 Know-How 门票 8 个维度深度拆解 AI Agent 商业化的第一个真正拐点。
article.meta_description_en: On July 10, 2026, The Information, Bloomberg, and TechCrunch simultaneously disclosed: Cursor ARR hit $4B, Cognition Devin $800M, Lindy $150M — three Agent leaders converging on the $1B threshold in 90 days. This article dissects the first true inflection point of AI Agent commercialization across 8 dimensions: fact-check, Cursor $4B revenue-per-employee economics, Cognition Devin production breakthrough, Lindy customer-service horizontal logic, foundation model layering, Agent per-unit pricing era, the fourth AI investment map reshaping, and the vertical Know-How ticket to the Agent era.
article.keywords: Cursor 40 亿 ARR, Cognition Devin, Lindy Agent, Kimi K3 开源, Anthropic 4000 亿, Agent 商业化, AI 编程 IDE, AI News Daily
article.keywords_en: Cursor 4B ARR, Cognition Devin, Lindy Agent, Kimi K3 open source, Anthropic 400B, Agent commercialization, AI coding IDE, AI News Daily
